nodes.label: MIDI Input
nodes.detail: noteOn/noteOff events trigger phantom voice allocation for polyphonic modulator context

nodes.label: Phantom Voice Allocation
nodes.detail: Allocates voices so hosted polyphonic modulators get per-voice state. No audio produced.

nodes.label: Global Modulators Chain
nodes.detail: GainChain repurposed in GlobalMode. Hosts any modulator type except Global*Modulator consumers (NoGlobalsConstrainer).

nodes.label: VoiceStart Data Arrays
nodes.detail: 128-element per-note-number arrays. Populated in preStartVoice(). Consumers read via getConstantVoiceValue().

nodes.label: TimeVariant Data Buffers
nodes.detail: Per-block shared buffers. Rendered in preVoiceRendering(). Consumers read via getModulationValuesForModulator().

nodes.label: Envelope Data Buffers
nodes.detail: Per-voice event-indexed buffers. Consumers read via getEnvelopeValuesForModulator(). Two-phase clear state prevents premature cutoff.

nodes.label: Audio Output (silence)
nodes.detail: calculateBlock() fills with zeros. No audio produced.

nodes.label: VoiceLimit
nodes.detail: Functional for phantom voice count but not for audio.

nodes.label: KillFadeTime
nodes.detail: Functional for phantom voice fade but not for audio.
